Hi, I'm Edward.

Data Scientist & Bioinformatics Researcher

I think about

Now

Personal Intro

MSc Bioinformatics graduate from the University of Melbourne. Originally from Taiwan, now based in Melbourne. I sit at the intersection of biology, data, and software — from crop genomics, metagenomics, to sports science pipelines.

Work

Data Scientist in sports medicine industry.

Research

Investigating biostatistics application on biomechanics and human health. Previously published two 1st-author papers on multi-omics data integration for soybean abiotic stress-tolerance gene discovery.

Side Projects

Building a web app for metagenomics data analysis pipeline.
